cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about Wu Jinyou and which statement is true about him. First, I need to go through the article again to find where Wu Jinyou is mentioned. The relevant part is towards the end: "Wu Jinyou, head of the Polar Research Institute of China, and the group's leader, said, 'I hope the students have not only a field trip to the Yellow River station, but are also touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers here. I also expect in the future, some of them will choose to devote themselves to polar research and maybe even work with us.'" Looking at the options: A) He is a graduate from Dalian Marinetime University. The article mentions Zheng Li is a student from Dalian Marinetime University, but there's no mention of Wu Jinyou's education. So A is not correct. B) He is the president of Dalian Marinetime University. The article doesn't state that. He is the head of the Polar Research Institute of China. So B is wrong. C) He thinks highly of the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers. The quote says he hopes the students are "touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers here." That implies he values their devotion and spirit. So C is correct. D) He is sure that all the ten students will make good polar
